descriptions: Level numbers on chain are different
Coin balance differs from reference
Incorrect level progression and coin data displayed across the screen.
Game board is rendered flat/straight-on instead of the tilted, angled perspective seen in the reference
The main game board in OURS is oriented vertically (not rotated/tilted) and is placed too high up under the 'Marble Run' banner, overlapping other elements.
Game board marble positions are completely different
Board is a different puzzle state: fewer marbles (5x5 grid reduced to 4x4 with far fewer balls), goal marble positions and colors swapped
The game board state and active interactive elements are in completely different configurations.
Coin count value differs
Coin balance value differs significantly
The coin reward/balance value displayed at the bottom-left is incorrect.
Hint button appears slightly larger
Board size and marble slot count differ due to fewer rows/columns
Sound Effects text is broken into two lines
Entire panel is zoomed in and shifted, cutting off top content and close button
The entire settings dialog is shifted upward, cutting off the top of the 'SETTINGS' header, ribbon, and the close button.
Decorative gear/cog element missing at bottom
Badge/ribbon icon below the panel is missing
Background text watermark present
The background opacity of the settings dialog is too transparent, revealing game elements (like 'Marble Run' text and level nodes) behind it.
Coin counter missing from top right
Coin counter badge (75) missing from top of screen
The dark brown wooden background panel behind the light blue content card is missing.
Extra coins scattered outside main panel
Extra scattered coin icons appear around the card and near the Next button
Stray gold coins are scattered randomly across the screen (one overlapping 'REWARD', a cluster at the bottom left of the card, and one floating above 'NEXT').
REWARD text styling differs
REWARD text overlaps with an extra coin icon, and Next button text style differs (all caps sans-serif vs stylized rounded font)
The font styles, outlines, 3D/drop-shadow effects on 'COMPLETED', 'REWARD', '+25', and 'Next' buttons do not match the stylized vector art of the reference.
Reward coin and text alignment
Card/banner layout scaled up and cropped, missing wooden frame background behind card
The main content card and the 'COMPLETED' ribbon are scaled up too large, cropping off the screen edges and losing their original proportions.
Green banner extends across entire width
Background color shade differs slightly
The background texture patterns (faint darker purple circular shapes) are missing or extremely faded compared to the reference.
Background ribbon/banner element missing
Wooden background panel behind the card is missing
The wooden board texture background sitting behind the popup is missing.
Different emoji expression
Different emoji used for sad face
The sad face emoji / icon in the center is completely different.
Green button has different text
Button text differs from reference
The green button has different text content.
Content is oversized and cropped, pushing elements off-screen at top and increasing overall scale
The red header banner 'FAILED' is incorrectly scaled and positioned, getting clipped at the top and sides of the screen rather than fitting as a card overlay.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 60% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
